items.br: Extrai as entradas de turno em escalas planejadas (Time and Labor), com horários, atributos de setup e gestor. Suporta gestão de escalas, cobertura de turnos e planejamento de workforce.
items.en: Extracts shift entries in planned schedules (Time and Labor), with times, setup attributes, and manager. Supports schedule management, shift coverage, and workforce planning.
items.es: Extrae las entradas de turno en escalas planificadas (Time and Labor), con horarios, atributos de setup y gestor. Soporta gestión de escalas, cobertura de turnos y planificación de workforce.
